top_signals.title: Index-linked Treasury Stock
top_signals.summary: Index-linked treasury stocks are gilts issued by the UK Government. They pay out twice a year, with the amount indexed to the Retail Prices Index.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: An off-grid power project gets a major proof of concept. What it means for GE Vernova
top_signals.summary: AI data centers powered by off-grid power plants took a major step forward this week, a good sign for GE Vernova as industry challenges pile up.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB publishes consolidated banking data for end-December 2025
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Guidance: The U.S. and UK Economic Sanctions Authorities: A Comparative Overview
top_signals.summary: This guidance compares key aspects of U.S. and UK sanctions regimes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Lets NRIs Leverage Deposits to Draw Dollars
top_signals.summary: RBI swap covers only principal, not interest.

top_signals.title: Airbus to inspect 16 A380s after cracks found on plane wings
top_signals.summary: Cracks found during maintenance checks appeared in the plane's structural beam that runs along the wing and carries much of the aerodynamic load during flight.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Largest wind farm in the United States slated to begin commercial operations
top_signals.summary: The SunZia Wind Project, the largest wind farm in the United States, is slated to begin commercial operations this month. The wind farm, located in New Mexico, has a total net summer generating capacity of 3,650 megawatts (MW) and is composed of 916 wind turbines. SunZia's capacity is more than three times larger than the next two largest wind farms, Alta Wind in Southern California (1,098 MW) and Great Prairie in northern Texas (1,027 MW). The SunZia Wind Project works with a high voltage transmission line to deliver the wind power generated to Arizona and California.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ex-wife arrested after bisected body found in freezer at Kobe apartment
top_signals.summary: The suspect has admitted to abandoning the body and also suggested that she killed her former husband, according to investigative sources.
